heading: Joint Committee during recess of Congress
label: 133 Joint Committee during recess of Congress
text: The portion of the Joint Committee of Congress on the Library on the part of the Senate remaining in office as Senators shall during the recess of Congress exercise the powers and discharge the duties conferred by law upon the Joint Committee of Congress on the Library.
notes: Amendments1946—Act , changed composition of Joint Committee. See .Aug. 2, 1946section 132b of this title
Effective Date of 1946 AmendmentAmendment by act , effective , see section 245 of that act, set out as a note under .Aug. 2, 1946Jan. 3, 1947section 4301 of this title
